titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 6: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 6. (A.R. No. 136 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Maṇavāḷēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 2: Mēsha, Sunday, Tiruvōṇam, Sunday is wrong for Monday
p.note: N. Sethuraman, Early Cholas: Mathermatics reconstructs the Chronology, P. 17.

summary.p: The inscription is built in at the right end. It records the remission of taxes on some plots of land belonging to the temple at Tiruvēḷvikkuḍi, which had been purchased from several persons by the peruṅguṟi-pperumakkaḷ of Viḍēlviḍugu- chchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Kurukkai-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, on receiving a lump-sum of 50 īḻākkāśu from a member of the Karikālachōḷa-teriñja-kaikkōḷar. As a post-script to this inscription the land called Śrī-Karaṇaperuviḷāgam reclaimed by madhyastha of Viḍēlviḍugu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and the specific services for which the yield from that land was to be utilized are mentioned.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 27.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu vaṭa
karaik kuṟukkaiñāṭṭu brahmadeyam veṭalviṭukuteviccatūrveti maṅ
kalattu peruṅkuṟiperumakkaḷom Ivvāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamai
peṟṟa tiruvoṇattiṉāṉṟu tiruveḻvikkuṭi śrī koyilile peruṅkuṟi kūṭi Iruntu paṇitta
ḻuttu tiruveḻvikuṭi caṇḍeśvarapperumāḷ tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa nilam
karumāṇikkavāykkāliṉ tenpakkattu kavaṉ kovinta nārāṇa
ttaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa nilam Āṟu mākkāṇiyum Itiṉ melaippakkattu Itiṉoṭum Aṭaiya
paṉūruṭaiyāṉ koṉ vempaṭikaḷ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam Araikkālum catinn=taṉ
ttu kūvaṉṉūr nārāṇakramavittan pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nila mākāṇiyum caṇḍeśvarap
perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vilai koṇṭuṭaiya pattu mācceykkum kiḻpāṟke
[llai madhya] sdharkaḷ kuḷattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum mel
kāṇikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
karu māṇikkavāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta peru nāṉkellaiyilum Akappa
ttuc ceyyālum tarattāl vanta nilam Āṟu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi nilamum peruvaḻikku
Irācūrt tāmotirapaṭṭan pakkal caṇḍeśvarapperumāḷ vilaikoṇṭa nilattu
pāṟkellai sabhaippotuvukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāvirimaṅkalattār
kku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai tirumañcuṇakkuṟaiyāṉa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
ḻikku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam tarattāl va
m Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa nilam Iṟaiyiliyākka vitiṉukku karikālacoḻat teriñca kaikko
ṉ Araiyaṉ pakkal Īḻakkācu Aimpatu Aimpatu kācu koṇṭu Iṉṉilam cantirāti
yili ceytu kuṭuttom viṭelviṭukutevi[ ccaturvvetimaṅkalattu] sabhaiyo
peruṅkuṟi Iruntu paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūrk kiṭakkai madhyasthaṉ Irāmaṉ I
tiya brahmapriyaneṉ Emperumāṉaṭiyārāṭiyeṉ tiruveḷvikkuṭi tiruveviḷkkuṭi śrīkaraṇattu
ppiccaneṉ nāṉ kalluvicca śrī karaṇapperuviḷākattu nel melvāram tiruccuṟṟum
yum gopuramum nicati nālāḷukku mukkuṟuṇi nellu ḷukku Aṭṭavum ma(ā)ṭaiyarkaḷuc ceyyil pokam
ru viḻāppuṟam ponta varici kuṟuṇiyum kuṟavaṟu ceyyak kaṭavarākac ceyta
Iddhanmam śrīkaraṇap paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
